outcomes.29: The sole retained static-267 model is unscorable because its Max operands have incompatible int64/int32 types. Of 31 other loose models, 30 screen at or above 270 and one is unscorable.
outcomes.51: The exact J2/J1 factorization reduces actual cost 283 to 280 and passes known examples, but the final operation remains a forbidden 65-input Einsum. Absorption into the only adjacent rank-3 carrier would add 15 parameters and is not cheaper.
outcomes.195: Of 24 non-baseline loose models, 23 screen at or above 150 and one is structurally rejected.
outcomes.397: Of 35 non-baseline loose models, 32 screen at or above 364, two are unscorable, and one is structurally rejected. The exact baseline itself fails strict data-propagating shape inference at Gather and was not treated as a reusable candidate.
outcomes.400: All 21 non-baseline loose models screen at or above cost 164.

fresh5000_skip_reason: No candidate survived both the strictly-cheaper and structural-safety gates.
